question_text: Let 𝑋1, 𝑋2, … , 𝑋10 be a random sample of size 10 from a population having 𝑁(0, 𝜃2) distribution, where 𝜃> 0 is an unknown parameter. Let 𝑇= 10 ∑ 𝑖=1 . If the mean square error of 𝑐𝑇 (𝑐> 0), as an estimator of 𝜃2, is minimized at 𝑐= 𝑐0, then the value of 𝑐0 equals
